text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
"Fuji Kiseki, whose decision to take on a huge
challenge has been the talk of the racing world,
will be running in today's Takamatsunomiya
Kinen!"

text_block_list.name: Announcer A
text_block_list.text:
"The stands are absolutely packed with fans who
came to see her participate in this 1,200-meter
blink-and-you'll-miss-it sprint!"

The screen pans over the audience, many of
whom are holding up Fuji Kiseki-branded goods
and large banners to cheer her on.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
That's incredible! I can feel how much they're
rooting for me, even through the screen!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They're all smiling so beautifully. I'm glad they're
enjoying themselves.
choice_data_list: The pressure isn't getting to you, is it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I can't put on a good performance if I
chicken out now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I promised to entertain everyone with the show of
a lifetime, and I intend to do just that!

She gestures enthusiastically to make her point
and accidentally knocks a paper cup off the
table.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sorry about that! Thank goodness it was only a
paper cup!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'd better wipe this up! Where's a towel when I
need one?!

She's not usually so clumsy. Something feels off.
While I'm trying to figure out what that might
be...

The curtains slowly rise on Fuji Kiseki's first senior
race—the Takamatsunomiya Kinen.
